title: Meme Foods
description: A humorous mod that adds overpowered Meme foods.
body:
# Meme Foods

A silly, over-the-top food and drink mod for Minecraft. Perfect for chaotic survival worlds or goofy servers. Adds meme-inspired consumables with fun effects and shaped crafting recipes.

---

## Items I’ve Added

* **Doritos** – spicy snack; gives Resistance and Fire Resistance for a short time.
* **Prime (Drink)** – powerful drink; gives Regeneration, extra health (Absorption), and Fire Protection.
* **Feastables Chocolate** – tasty chocolate bar; gives Glowing for a short time.
* **Lunchly** – questionable meal; causes debuffs like Nausea, Poison, and Blindness.
* **Mountain Dew** – MLG energizer; gives Speed and Jump Boost.
* **Mango Smoothie** – restorative drink; gives Absorption and a chance of Regeneration.
* **Flamin' Hot Cheetos** – spicy snack; gives Speed and Fire Resistance with a chance of Nausea.
* **Monster** – energy drink; gives Speed and a short Strength boost.
* **Grimace Shake** – weird milkshake; gives Regeneration and Glowing for a short time.
* **Ohio Final Boss Burger** – legendary burger; gives Strength and Resistance, but also inflicts Darkness and Nausea for a short time.


*(More items coming soon!)*

---

## How to Get Them

### 1) Crafting (Shaped Recipes)

All recipes are shaped and included in the mod's datagen output. Example recipe images:

![Dorito crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f11bd50d8888c0b89dab5d7e5a7dd9d55cfb74e.png)
![Prime bottle crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96ab8587961e7e4f94e0dd9a25b2b085c484bfeb.png)
![MrBeast's feastables chocolate crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97079175477f53ab2566243d85bee45a70404c62.png)
![Lunchly crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4de4077350ca21a688e0e0c5a3e4e564faec5eca.png)

*(And many more!)*

### 2) Creative Mode

All items can be found in the creative inventory under the mod's food/drink tab.

---

## Purpose

This mod is a fun experiment made as a joke for friends. It adds ridiculous, meme-inspired food and drinks to Minecraft. No complicated mechanics, just silly items to mess around with.

---

## Compatibility & Notes

* **Requires Fabric** – make sure your Fabric loader and Fabric API versions match your Minecraft client or server.
* Real brand names are used for comedic effect.
* Works best in casual worlds or servers where chaos is encouraged.

---

## Disclaimer

This mod is made for fun and is not connected to or approved by any real companies or brands.  
All brand names, logos, and references belong to their original owners.  
Everything in this mod is used in a joking, parody-style way and is not meant to be taken seriously.
